content.en:
As time passed, the injuries of the Mili Domain Ancestor and the Ten Thousand Life Domain Ancestor became more and more serious.

Of course, they have a lot of means to save their lives, and as an invincible domain ancestor, it is more difficult to kill them unless the difference in strength is too large.

For the Mili Domain Ancestor and the Wansheng Domain Ancestor, they have no way to escape now, if they can't escape, then the final result will be to be consumed by Ye Tian.

"Ask for help!"

Mi Li Yu Ancestor proposed.

The Ten Thousand Elements Domain Ancestor agreed, there was no way, Ye Tian's Five Elements Prohibition was too terrifying, when they were fighting with Ye Tian, they couldn't be distracted to break the Five Elements Blockade, and they couldn't defeat the Ten Thousand Elements Domain Ancestor in the Xuanxu Holy Realm, so they could only ask for help.

Therefore, they used special teleportation objects to send a message to the Qingyuan Holy Land Ancestors of the Daoshan Realm, and then let the Domain Ancestors of the Qingyuan Holy Land try to contact the Holy Lord of the Qingyuan Holy Land.

The Dark Forbidden Realm is isolated from communication, and it is very far away from the Qingyuan Holy Land, so it is impossible to communicate at all.

Only by entering the Battle Boundary Tower or using a rare formation to forcibly connect to the Qingyuan Holy Land can you barely achieve the transmission back to the Qingyuan Holy Land.

And the Mili Domain Ancestor and the Wansheng Domain Ancestor were fighting, and they couldn't contact the Qingyuan Holy Land, so they could only send a message to the Domain Ancestors of the Qingyuan Holy Land in the Daoshan Realm, asking them to try to contact the Qingyuan Holy Land.

---------------

Qingyuan Holy Land.

The Blue Blade Holy Lord received a message from the Holy Domain Ancestor and learned about the situation in the Xuanxu Holy Realm.

For the first time, he did not believe the source of the news.

But soon, he was sure in many ways and finally confirmed that the news was true.

"How is it possible, the strength of the Ten Thousand Laws Domain Ancestor is so strong, this is too exaggerated!"

The Blue Blade Holy Lord was dumbfounded.

The two Invincible Domain Ancestors he mobilized were five-step Invincible Domain Ancestors, which was not weak, even if he only had the strength of a two-step Invincible Domain Ancestor.

Hearing this news, the Blue Blade Holy Lord was very hesitant and didn't know what to do.

Save?

Once saved, it is necessary to send a top invincible domain ancestor, otherwise it will not be possible to save the Mili Domain Ancestor and the Wansheng Domain Ancestor at all, and some treasures must be used, otherwise it will be too late to rescue.

And once the top invincible domain ancestor was dispatched, the secret of Qingyuan Holy Land's attack was exposed.

After all, those invincible domain ancestors of more than three steps in the Qingyuan Holy Land are all known to the outside world, and once they make a move, their identities will inevitably be known.

In this way, it will completely offend the Ancestor of the Ten Thousand Laws Domain and the Battle Gate.

Even if the battle gate does not destroy their Qingyuan Holy Land, if they are suppressed casually, the life of the Qingyuan Holy Land will be sad, and it is even likely that they will not be able to keep the name of the Holy Land.

If the name of the Holy Land is lost, the enemies of the Qingyuan Holy Land will not let go of the Qingyuan Holy Land.

At that time, Qing Yuan Sheng might be destroyed.

But if it is not saved, the loss of the Qingyuan Holy Land will be great, not only will it lose the two invincible domain ancestors, but it will also lose the holy artifact Qingyuan Boundary Bead.

And once the Qingyuan Realm Bead falls into the hands of the Ten Thousand Law Domain Ancestor, as long as the Ten Thousand Law Domain Ancestor investigates, he will be able to find out that the Qingyuan Realm Bead, a holy artifact, belongs to the Qingyuan Holy Land.

At that time, the Qingyuan Holy Land will still be exposed.

"We must save the Mili Domain Ancestor and the Ten Thousand Life Domain Ancestor, but it can't be the invincible domain ancestors who have become famous in our Qingyuan Holy Land!"

The Blue Blade Holy Lord thought to himself.

After pondering for a few seconds, he thought of someone.

Loose cultivation - Weeping Blood Emperor!

The Weeping Blood Emperor is also a legendary figure, and his talent is not very good, but relying on one adventure after another, coupled with cruelty, he has seized many opportunities for peerless demons and killed many disciples of the Holy Gate, so he can grow up to the present.

The strength of the Weeping Blood Emperor is very strong, and he is also a two-step invincible domain ancestor.

However, the Weeping Blood Emperor was on the wanted lists of many Holy Gates, and was hunted down by the Invincible Domain Ancestor of the Holy Gate and even the Supreme Domain Ancestor.

However, the Weeping Blood Emperor is very difficult to kill, its body is a river of blood, cultivated in human form with the river of blood, and has grown to this day, and where his body is, no one knows, and the people who usually go out are clones.

The strength of these clones is not as good as the main body, only the strength of the three-step domain ancestor, but even if the clone falls, it can form a clone again after cultivating for a period of time.

It is precisely by relying on the particularity of the clone that he can seize countless opportunities, and he is not afraid of being chased by others.

For example, many invincible domain ancestors killed him many times, but they all killed clones.

Unless it is a peerless domain ancestor who is proficient in the Cause and Effect Sacred Technique, he can easily kill the Weeping Blood Emperor.

However, the clone of the Weeping Blood Emperor is not so easy to find, and the Superior Domain Ancestor will not spend a long time idle to hunt down an Invincible Domain Ancestor.

As a result, the Weeping Blood Emperor has survived to this day.

What no one knew was that the Blue Blade Holy Lord and the Weeping Blood Emperor knew each other.

In other words, he had cooperated with the Weeping Blood Emperor many times, and he had also broken into the Dark Forbidden Domain, so his relationship with each other was okay.

Of course, let the Weeping Blood Emperor help him for free, and the Weeping Blood Emperor will definitely not do it.

But as long as he pays some price, the Weeping Blood Emperor is absolutely willing to do it, and only he dares to offend the disciples of the Holy Gate.

I saw that the Blue Blade Holy Lord was holding a teleportation object and sending it to the Weeping Blood Emperor.

It was easier to communicate in the Dark Sanctuary, as long as the Weeping Blood Emperor was still in the Dark Sanctuary, he could contact him.

"Blue Blade Holy Lord, what's the matter?"

The messenger heard the voice of the Weeping Blood Emperor.

"Weeping Blood Emperor, there's something I want you to help with!"

The Blue Blade Holy Lord said directly.

"Say!"

Weeping Blood Emperor Road.

"The two invincible domain ancestors of our Qingyuan Holy Land are a threat in the Xuanxu Holy Realm, and they are trapped by the strongest domain ancestors of the Battle Gate, and there is a risk of falling, the Battle Gate does not know that it is the domain ancestor of our Qingyuan Holy Land, and I don't want to expose the existence of the Qingyuan Holy Land, so I want you to go to the Xuanxu Holy Realm to rescue. If it succeeds, I am willing to give you the Thousand Blood Lotus!"

The Blue Blade Holy Lord pleaded.

"Thousand Blood Treasure Lotus !!!" the Weeping Blood Emperor's voice was slightly excited, "I didn't expect that Qingfeng Holy Lord you were so generous, and you would spend such a big price for the two Invincible Domain Ancestors, it seems that what those two Invincible Domain Ancestors did was not simple." Don't worry, I won't care what those two Invincible Domain Ancestors have done, or what treasures they have obtained, with our relationship, I won't plot against the things of your Qingyuan Holy Land. However, this time it was the Battle Gate that I offended, and the Thousand Blood Lotus alone was not enough for me to make a move, and I also needed the Phoenix Blood Soul Fruit in the mysterious cave that we broke into before, I only need three. If you agree, I will go to the Dao Mountain Realm Xuanxu Saint Realm as fast as possible. "

"Okay, I promise!"

The Blue Blade Holy Lord agreed.

In fact, even if the Weeping Blood Emperor asked for more excessive requests, he would agree, otherwise the Qingyuan Holy Land would be in complete trouble.

Besides, once it succeeds, the two Invincible Domain Ancestors will be fine, and the Qingyuan Holy Land will also get a saint-grade ore vein, and it will make a lot of money!
